conclusion: 宏观判断置信度不足；本期宏观数据仅作为市场环境展示，不进入评分，不改变候选池结论。

metrics.label: 000001.SH 指数涨跌
metrics.limitations: Only displays local index_daily coverage; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: 000001.SH 指数收盘
metrics.limitations: Only displays local index_daily coverage; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: 000300.SH 指数涨跌
metrics.limitations: Only displays local index_daily coverage; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: 000300.SH 指数收盘
metrics.limitations: Only displays local index_daily coverage; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: 样本市盈率中位数
metrics.limitations: Local market_daily_basic coverage is a display proxy, not a full-market valuation score.

metrics.label: 样本市净率中位数
metrics.limitations: Local market_daily_basic coverage is a display proxy, not a full-market valuation score.

metrics.label: 样本总市值合计
metrics.limitations: Tushare daily_basic/market_daily_basic total_mv unit must be confirmed before display scaling; display proxy only.

metrics.label: 样本市场宽度：上涨家数
metrics.limitations: Only based on current local stock_daily coverage; does not represent the full A-share market.

metrics.label: 样本市场宽度：下跌家数
metrics.limitations: Only based on current local stock_daily coverage; does not represent the full A-share market.

metrics.label: 样本市场宽度：平盘家数
metrics.limitations: Only based on current local stock_daily coverage; does not represent the full A-share market.

metrics.label: 样本市场宽度：上涨占比
metrics.limitations: Only based on current local stock_daily coverage; display only and not a full-market breadth indicator.

metrics.label: 样本成交额合计
metrics.limitations: Tushare daily amount unit must be confirmed before display scaling; derived from local stock_daily coverage only.

metrics.label: GDP同比
metrics.limitations: Uses quarter/gdp/gdp_yoy directly. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: GDP现价总量
metrics.limitations: Uses quarter/gdp/gdp_yoy directly. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: CPI同比
metrics.limitations: Maps national CPI YoY/MoM from nt_yoy/nt_mom. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: CPI环比
metrics.limitations: Maps national CPI YoY/MoM from nt_yoy/nt_mom. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: PPI同比
metrics.limitations: cn_ppi mapping: headline PPI uses ppi_yoy and ppi_mom; prior probe expected ppi_mp, but actual fields are ppi_mp_yoy/ppi_mp_mom for production-material sub-series. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: PPI环比
metrics.limitations: cn_ppi mapping: headline PPI uses ppi_yoy and ppi_mom; prior probe expected ppi_mp, but actual fields are ppi_mp_yoy/ppi_mp_mom for production-material sub-series. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: 制造业PMI
metrics.limitations: cn_pmi uses uppercase coded fields. MONTH is the date field; PMI010000 is mapped to headline manufacturing PMI, PMI010100 to production sub-index pending dictionary review. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: 生产指数PMI
metrics.limitations: cn_pmi uses uppercase coded fields. MONTH is the date field; PMI010000 is mapped to headline manufacturing PMI, PMI010100 to production sub-index pending dictionary review. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: M2同比
metrics.limitations: Uses m2_yoy/m1_yoy directly. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: M1同比
metrics.limitations: Uses m2_yoy/m1_yoy directly. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: 社融当月增量
metrics.limitations: sf_month does not return YoY in probe. V6.6A displays original inc_month/stk_endval only; units require Tushare field-document confirmation and YoY derivation is deferred. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: 社融存量
metrics.limitations: sf_month does not return YoY in probe. V6.6A displays original inc_month/stk_endval only; units require Tushare field-document confirmation and YoY derivation is deferred. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: LPR 1年
metrics.limitations: shibor_lpr maps 1Y/5Y LPR from fields named 1y and 5y. Display only; not used in scoring.

metrics.label: LPR 5年
metrics.limitations: shibor_lpr maps 1Y/5Y LPR from fields named 1y and 5y. Display only; not used in scoring.

data_source_compliance.field_notes: Maps national CPI YoY/MoM from nt_yoy/nt_mom.
cn_ppi mapping: headline PPI uses ppi_yoy and ppi_mom; prior probe expected ppi_mp, but actual fields are ppi_mp_yoy/ppi_mp_mom for production-material sub-series.
cn_pmi uses uppercase coded fields. MONTH is the date field; PMI010000 is mapped to headline manufacturing PMI, PMI010100 to production sub-index pending dictionary review.
sf_month does not return YoY in probe. V6.6A displays original inc_month/stk_endval only; units require Tushare field-document confirmation and YoY derivation is deferred.
shibor_lpr maps 1Y/5Y LPR from fields named 1y and 5y.

limitations: Macro data is display-only and does not affect scoring or candidate labels.
Local breadth/valuation indicators are derived from existing local cache coverage and may not represent the full A-share universe.
cn_pmi coded fields require a formal field dictionary before stronger interpretation.
sf_month units and YoY derivation are deferred pending Tushare field documentation confirmation.
market_total_mv_sample and market_turnover_amount_sample units are displayed as interface original unit pending confirmation.

note: Full macro API cache is intentionally excluded from the V6.6B main workbench and deploy-ready package.
